sync.tooltipSaveSession: Save the current sync state to a .json file. Includes: SRT path, video path, all confirmed anchors and offsets. Useful to pause and resume work later.
sync.tooltipSaveFile: Export the final synchronized SRT file (.srt) with all timing corrections from anchors applied. This is the ready-to-use output file.
sync.dropSrtFirst: Load an SRT file first, then the audio.
sync.needAudioForAnchor: Load an audio file before confirming anchors.
sync.dropFileHint: First the SRT file, then the Audio/Video file (or both)
sync.wizard.allSynced: All subtitles appear to be synchronized!
sync.wizard.suggestSave: The offset is consistent across all checkpoints. You can save the file now.
sync.wizard.selectCheckpoint: Select a subtitle from the list to start
sync.newSyncDesc: Reset and start a new synchronization
comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
transcribe.title: Audio Transcription
transcribe.subtitle: Generate SRT subtitles from audio/video using Whisper AI
transcribe.whisperModelDesc: Download models for local transcription. Click a model to download and set it as default.
transcribe.modelDownloadNote: This model is not downloaded yet. Please download it before starting transcription.
transcribe.selectFilesFirst: Please select input and output files first
transcribe.wordTimestampsDesc: Millimetric subtitles. Also allows Whisper to split sentences across multiple lines.
